issues.claim: Verse supports chapter 7 thesis at appropriate thread
issues.objection: 7.24 sits in thread 3 (the unintelligent mistake the manifest for the whole; STRETCHED metaphysics) of the chapter-7 thesis; the engineering layer remains anchored to that thread. Chapter 7's voice (declarative-revelatory; senior-revealing) is honored. STRETCHED tagging is honest where the verse's metaphysical reach exceeds the operational analog (per thesis: 7.21-7.26 and 7.29-7.30 expected to run STRETCHED; 7.27-7.28 STRONG). The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Verse claims metaphysical concealment (avyaktaṁ vyaktim āpannaṁ mistaken). Engineering analog scoped narrowly: architecture diagrams are partial; the substrate carried by the senior is not directly diagrammable. Counter-example: stale tacit assumption is not the verse's paraṁ bhāvam.

notes: 7.24 supports the chapter-7 thesis: thread 3 (the unintelligent mistake the manifest for the whole; STRETCHED metaphysics). Verse-ordering coherence: progressive build-up from faith-firm doctrine (7.21-7.22) → bounded-fruit (7.23) → metaphysical concealment (7.24-7.26) → dualities-and-meritorious-cross (7.27-7.28) → knowing-at-departure (7.29-7.30) honored. PASS.
